entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: Lack of consistent access to enough food for an active, healthy life

entities.name: UNDER-NUTRITION
entities.description: A deficiency of essential nutrients in the diet

entities.name: EASTERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: FOOD CONSUMPTION PATTERN
entities.description: The habits and types of food consumed by households

entities.name: NUTRITION INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nutrients consumed by individuals or households

entities.name: NUTRIENT INTAKE GAP
entities.description: The difference between the required nutrient intake and the actual intake

entities.name: NUTRIENT INTAKE DEFICIT
entities.description: A state where nutrient intake is below the required level

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC AND DEMOGRAPHIC VARIABLES
entities.description: Factors such as income, education, and family size that influence food security

entities.name: CALORIE DEFICIT STATUS
entities.description: A state where the energy intake is lower than the energy expenditure

entities.name: INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Planned actions to improve food and nutrition security
